content.full_text:
June 17, 1992

Mr. Scott Hallabrin, General Counsel
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Dear Mr. Hallabrin:

This will confirm advise given this date to my secretary Pat Frodsham by John Wallace of your office concerning permissable use of PAC funds.

We were advised that the District Council of Iron Workers Political Action League - ID# 831693 can pay for the hotel and airfare of delegates to the National Democratic Convention in New York City as a PAC business expense.

With best wishes, I remain

Very truly yours,

[signature]
Richard Zampa, Treasurer
District Council of Iron Workers
Political Action League-ID#831693

RZ-pf
ope 3 afl cio
